watermark.valueCandidate: Lumen5 watermarks may appear in the editor/media library preview but are removed once the video is rendered.
watermark.snippet: The watermark article says preview watermarks in the editor and media library do not appear on the rendered video.
watermark.sourceTitle: Why are there watermarks on my video? | Lumen5 Knowledge Base

commercialUse.valueCandidate: Lumen5 says users have full commercial rights to created videos and can create videos for clients.
commercialUse.snippet: The monetization article says users have full commercial rights to videos created with Lumen5 and can monetize them or create videos on behalf of clients.
commercialUse.sourceTitle: Can I monetize my videos or create them for my clients? | Lumen5 Knowledge Base

usageRights.valueCandidate: Lumen5 says almost all media library assets are copyright-free and free for commercial use, subject to editorial-media rules.
usageRights.snippet: The commercial-use and editorial-license articles say the media library is largely copyright-free for commercial use, while editorial-only assets remain limited to editorial contexts.
usageRights.sourceTitle: Can I monetize my videos or create them for my clients? | Lumen5 Knowledge Base

refundCancellation.valueCandidate: Will my videos remain accessible if I downgrade or cancel my plan?
refundCancellation.snippet: Will my videos remain accessible if I downgrade or cancel my plan? +

refundCancellation.valueCandidate: Yes. All videos you create are yours to keep permanently. You can download and reuse them even if you cancel your plan. You will only lose access to premium features associated with higher tier subscriptions.
refundCancellation.snippet: Yes. All videos you create are yours to keep permanently. You can download and reuse them even if you cancel your plan. You will only lose access to premium features associated with higher tier subscriptions.

mainLimitations.valueCandidate: “We’re able to create a video quickly with a turnaround of five minutes versus trying to coordinate with an agency and see if they have time to fit you in. With Lumen5, you could just get it right then and there.”
mainLimitations.snippet: “We’re able to create a video quickly with a turnaround of five minutes versus trying to coordinate with an agency and see if they have time to fit you in. With Lumen5, you could just get it right then and there.”

mainLimitations.valueCandidate: “The best part about Lumen5 is that it's not time-consuming. It's really easy and you only need a couple of minutes to create a video because everything is included.”
mainLimitations.snippet: “The best part about Lumen5 is that it's not time-consuming. It's really easy and you only need a couple of minutes to create a video because everything is included.”

mainLimitations.valueCandidate: All paid plans include AI Script Composer, AI Voiceover, and high quality AI media. The Basic plan includes standard AI features, while Starter and Pro offer expanded AI capabilities and longer AI voiceover limits. The Team plan introduces advanced capabilities like translations and custom AI Voice options.
mainLimitations.snippet: All paid plans include AI Script Composer, AI Voiceover, and high quality AI media. The Basic plan includes standard AI features, while Starter and Pro offer expanded AI capabilities and longer AI voiceover limits. The Team plan introduces advanced capabili...

mainLimitations.valueCandidate: Lumen5 combines powerful AI with a simple drag-and-drop interface to help you create professional video content in minutes.

workflowFeatureDocs.valueCandidate: It depends on your goals. The Basic and Starter plans are ideal for individual creators who need simple, fast video creation. Pro is best for small businesses that require advanced branding, premium media, and more customization. The Team plan is built for organizations that need custom templates, collaboration features, workflow controls, translations, SSO, and enterprise grade support.
workflowFeatureDocs.snippet: It depends on your goals. The Basic and Starter plans are ideal for individual creators who need simple, fast video creation. Pro is best for small businesses that require advanced branding, premium media, and more customization. The Team plan is built for...

workflowFeatureDocs.valueCandidate: The Team plan includes everything in Pro plus enterprise capabilities such as custom branded templates, bespoke scene designs, workspace and user management, translation tools, SSO, approval workflows, DAM integrations, and a dedicated customer success manager. It is designed for companies scaling video creation across multiple teams or locations.
workflowFeatureDocs.snippet: The Team plan includes everything in Pro plus enterprise capabilities such as custom branded templates, bespoke scene designs, workspace and user management, translation tools, SSO, approval workflows, DAM integrations, and a dedicated customer success mana...

workflowFeatureDocs.valueCandidate: Lumen5 turns blog posts or article links into videos and uses NLP plus computer vision to build storyboards and media matches.
workflowFeatureDocs.snippet: Lumen5's help center says users can paste a blog or article link and the platform uses NLP and computer vision to generate a storyboard with matched media and music.
workflowFeatureDocs.sourceTitle: How does Lumen5 work? | Lumen5 Knowledge Base
